Home/Services/Intercom

Intercom

Intercom systems for lobbies, gates, and occupied buildings

Opticable installs audio and video intercom systems for lobbies, gates, and visitor entries in commercial and multi-tenant buildings. Coordinated with access control, cameras, and the network for entry communication that is reliable, well integrated, and easy to manage.

Request a quoteView all services

Services

Audio or video intercom systems for lobbies, gates, and visitor entries, integrated with access control and the network.

Intercom

What we install

  • Audio intercoms for communication between the entry and an indoor station or phone
  • Video intercoms with integrated cameras to identify visitors before unlocking
  • Durable wall stations and entry pedestals for lobbies, reception areas, and gates
  • Integration with access control so doors can be unlocked from an indoor station or mobile device

Unified ecosystem

Unified ecosystem for intercom, access, and cameras

Intercom, access control, and cameras can operate inside one ecosystem, with one platform to identify visitors, manage access, and monitor the entry. We install them together in a coordinated way to simplify day-to-day management.

Buildings

Where it fits

  • Multi-tenant buildings with secured entry
  • Office buildings with reception desks or visitor access
  • Retail spaces with delivery zones or restricted access
  • Covered parking and underground access points
  • Exterior gates and property courtyards

Process

How the work is handled

  • 01 - Entry review: door type, visitor flow, mechanical constraints, and existing infrastructure.
  • 02 - Clear recommendation: audio or video, access-control integration, and number of stations.
  • 03 - Clean installation: concealed cabling, solid mounting, configuration, and full testing.
  • 04 - Commissioning: operation validated and integration with the other systems confirmed.

Building types

Where this service is most often used

These pages show the building types where this service is commonly part of the project.

Technology for multi-tenant buildings

Intercom or video intercom, access control for entrances, cameras in common areas, shared WiFi, and a simple building-management workflow.

View this industry

Technology for office buildings

Entrances to secure, technical rooms to control, uneven WiFi coverage, network rooms to clean up, and new workstations or tenants to connect.

View this industry
View all industries

Helpful pages before your intercom request

These pages answer common planning, pricing, and decision questions before a site visit or quote.

Intercom costs vary by entrance type, user count, audio or video needs, cabling, door release, and access-control integration.

Reading time3 min read

IntercomVideo intercomCommercial entrances

Audio or video intercom: which is right for your commercial entrance?

Audio is simpler and often cheaper. Video adds verification and context when the entrance risk or visitor flow justifies it.

Read the article
AuthorOpticable Team
PublishedDecember 4, 2025
Reading time2 min read

Access control or intercom: what does your building actually need?

Access control and intercoms solve different problems. The strongest entrance setup often combines both.

Request a quote

Looking for an intercom system for an entry or gate? Tell us about the building and the type of access you need to manage.

Opticable serves commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, the Laurentians, and across Quebec.

Services

Related services

Related services that often support the same technology roadmap.

Access control

Readers, locks, panels, door cabling, and ongoing access administration for lobbies, entries, and restricted areas.

View service

Security cameras

IP cameras, PoE, NVRs, remote viewing, and ongoing support to protect sensitive areas, common spaces, perimeters, and entries.

View service

Network infrastructure

Main network rooms, racks, patch panels, handoffs, and clean distribution for building systems that are easier to operate.

View service

Commercial WiFi

WiFi quality, access points, coverage planning, cabling, and network foundations for commercial buildings.

View service

IT services

Device management, network support, maintenance, and technical support for your environment after installation.

View service

Structured cabling

Cat 5e, Cat 6, Cat 6A, coaxial, patch panels, testing, and documentation for a clean building network base.

View service

Fiber optic

Backbone links between floors, network rooms, and distant zones when capacity or distance outgrows copper.

View service

IP telephony

Business telephony, SIP lines, handsets, VoIP cabling, and network support for commercial offices.

View service

Opticable installs and supports cameras, access, WiFi, intercom, cabling, and network infrastructure for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, and across Quebec.
